name: '55 Vapid Stanier
description: Classic 1955 sedan with vintage styling. Part of the Vintage Vice City Pack — a nod to Tommy Vercetti-era Vice City.
acquisition: Included with ALL GTA6 pre-orders (Standard and Ultimate Edition). Also included with purchases made before November 20, 2026. Comes with a garage near Ocean Beach (includes weapon locker and stolen goods storage).
tips: Your first classic car. The Ocean Beach garage that comes with it is a safehouse — store weapons and contraband there. The car itself is likely a cruiser, not a racer.

name: '95 Grotti Cheetah
description: Classic 1995 Grotti Cheetah — the iconic Vice City supercar returns. Ultimate Edition exclusive vehicle.
acquisition: GTA6 Ultimate Edition exclusive. Not obtainable in Standard Edition. Part of the Ultimate Edition Classic Car Collection — find and restore abandoned vehicles commissioned by a character named Wyman.
tips: If it drives anything like the original Vice City Cheetah, it'll be the fastest car you can get early-game. The restoration mission chain may unlock performance upgrades.

name: '67 Vapid Dominator Boogie
description: 1967 muscle car with retro styling and modern performance tuning. Ultimate Edition exclusive vehicle.
acquisition: GTA6 Ultimate Edition exclusive. Not obtainable in Standard Edition. Part of the Ultimate Edition Classic Car Collection.
tips: Muscle cars trade handling for raw speed — this is a drag strip monster, not a corner carver. Save it for highway runs.

name: Dinka Enduro
description: Off-road motorcycle built for the Everglades and Leonida backcountry. Ultimate Edition exclusive vehicle.
acquisition: GTA6 Ultimate Edition exclusive. Not obtainable in Standard Edition.
tips: If you plan to explore the Everglades and Grassrivers, this is your go-to vehicle. Dirt bikes handle mud and shallow water better than any car.

name: Shitzu Squalo
description: High-performance speedboat. Ultimate Edition exclusive watercraft.
acquisition: GTA6 Ultimate Edition exclusive. Not obtainable in Standard Edition.
tips: GTA6 has a much larger water map than previous titles. Having a fast boat from day one is a real advantage for offshore missions and island hopping.

name: Crest Kayak
description: Lightweight kayak for stealthy water traversal. Ultimate Edition exclusive watercraft. Spawns at Jason's safehouse.
acquisition: GTA6 Ultimate Edition exclusive. Not obtainable in Standard Edition.
tips: Silent water approach — useful if there are stealth water infiltration missions. Also just fun for exploring the Leonida Keys.
